zh.Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne,: 法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Archambaud de BOURBON VII於1110年11月15日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，他的父親Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon31歲，母親Lucie Nevers28歲。他於從1130年1月8日到1138年1月7日與Agnes de Savoie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年8月9日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

en.lifeSummary: When Archambaud de BOURBON VII was born on 15 November 1110, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon, was 31 and his mother, Lucie Nevers, was 28. He married Agnes de Savoie from 8 January 1130 to 7 January 1138. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 9 August 1169, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archambaud de BOURBON VII est né le 15 novembre 1110, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lucie Nevers, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Savoie du 8 janvier 1130 au 7 janvier 1138. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 août 1169, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archambaud de BOURBON VII am 15. November 1110 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon 31 und seine Mutter Lucie Nevers 28. Er hat von 8. Januar 1130 bis 7. Januar 1138 Agnes de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. August 1169 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud de BOURBON VII è nato il il 15 novembre 1110 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lucie Nevers, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Savoie da 8 gennaio 1130 a 7 gennaio 1138. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 agosto 1169, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Archambaud de BOURBON VIIが1110年11月15日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbonは31歳，母Lucie Neversは28歳であった。から1130年1月8日まで1138年1月7日にAgnes de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年8月9日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Archambaud de BOURBON VII(이)가 1110년 11월 15일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucie Nevers(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1130년 1월 8일부터 1138년 1월 7일까지 Agnes de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 8월 9일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud de BOURBON VII nasceu em 15 de novembro de 1110, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lucie Nevers, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Savoie de 8 de janeiro de 1130 a 7 de janeiro de 1138. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1169, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archambaud de BOURBON VII родился 15 ноября 1110 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lucie Nevers, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Savoie с 8 января 1130 по 7 января 1138. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 августа 1169 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archambaud de BOURBON VII nació el 15 de noviembre de 1110, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Aimon Bourbon Lord of Bourbon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lucie Nevers, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes de Savoie desde 8 de enero de 1130 hasta 7 de enero de 1138. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1169, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 58 años.
